_comment: TEMPLATE / SOURCE-OF-TRUTH for the webhooks this product expects. Apply via the Apify API (POST /v2/webhooks) or by mirroring these settings in Console. Nothing here is auto-deployed; <PLACEHOLDERS> must be filled with YOUR real ids/secrets. See docs/apify/webhooks.md.

verification.note: Receiver rejects any request that matches neither method.

webhooks.name: report-succeeded-output-health
webhooks.description: When the report-builder run succeeds, verify OUTPUT HEALTH (success != valid output) before telling the user the audit is ready.

webhooks.name: pipeline-failed-alert
webhooks.description: Any actor in the pipeline fails -> alert.

webhooks.name: pipeline-timed-out-alert
webhooks.description: Timeout -> alert + check whether compliance backoff was excessive.

webhooks.name: crawler-aborted-compliance-audit
webhooks.description: Crawler ABORTED is often a compliance STOP (401/403/429). Route to human review, never as failure-to-hide.
